basics.name: Luca Fehlings
basics.label: Scientist
basics.summary: Device engineer researching memory devices and their integration into CMOS circuits

work.name: NaMLab gGmbH
work.summary: Fabrication, electrical characterization on modeling of emerging memory devices for integration with neuromorphic CMOS systems. Focus on integration of HfO2-based FeRAM with CMOS circuits to realise functional blocks for neurons and synapses with biological time-scales in spiking neural networks.

awards.title: Best Student Paper Award
awards.summary: Shared first author on the paper 'A Ferroelectric Tunnel Junction-Based Integrate-And-Fire Neuron'
